login.title: KB-Agent
login.subtitle_login: Sign in to your knowledge base
login.switch_to_login: Already have an account? Sign in
login.err_domain: Email domain is not on the allowed list
login.err_email_not_verified: Email not verified. Please check your inbox for the verification email.
login.err_account_locked: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {minutes} minute(s).
login.pending_verification_desc: A verification email has been sent to {email}. Click the link in the email to activate your account (valid for 24 hours).
login.forgot_desc: Enter your registered email and we'll send a 6-digit code
login.forgot_sent: A code has been sent (if this email is registered). Please check your inbox.
login.reset_success: Password reset successfully. Please log in with your new password.
login.err_reset_invalid: Code is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.

chat.ask_placeholder: Ask a question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.ask_subtitle: AI answers based on documents and cites the source

messageBubble.engine_unavailable: Sorry, the AI engine is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
messageBubble.format_error: Sorry, there was a formatting issue with the response. Please try asking again.
messageBubble.no_answer: Sorry, no valid answer could be retrieved. Please try asking again.
messageBubble.no_docs: There are no classified documents in this workspace yet.

documents.drop_here: Drop here to move out of folder / make top-level
documents.delete_confirm: Delete document "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
documents.delete_to_trash_confirm: Move "{title}" to trash? You can restore it within 30 days.
documents.delete_folder_confirm: Delete this folder? Sub-folders will also be deleted; documents inside will be moved out (not deleted).

account.title: Account
account.err_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
account.deactivate_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.admin_cannot_deactivate: Admin accounts cannot be self-deleted. Please contact another admin.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.err_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

whatsnew.title: What's New
whatsnew.trigger_success: Summary generation task submitted. Refresh the page to see results.
whatsnew.no_reports: No updates yet. Summaries are generated automatically each day.
whatsnew.sub_email_hint: Emails will be sent to your login address
whatsnew.sub_save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
whatsnew.sub_delete_failed: Failed to unsubscribe. Please try again.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.question: Question:
stats.log_no_files: No log files (created automatically under logs/ when the backend starts)
stats.log_select_hint: Select a log file to view its contents

settings.title: Settings
settings.branding_desc: Customize the platform name and logo shown in the top-left.
settings.branding_logo_label: Logo image URL (leave empty to use initials)
settings.branding_saved: Branding saved. Refresh the page to apply.
settings.engine_desc: Select the backend for classification and Q&A. Unavailable options are disabled.
settings.task_model_desc: Specify a model per task. Leave blank to use the global default ({default}).
settings.domain_desc: Empty = nobody can register. Only listed domain emails may register (exact match).
settings.whatsnew_saved: What's New will run {freq} at {hour}:00 UTC
settings.whatsnew_trigger_success: Task submitted. Check the What's New page shortly.
settings.suggested_desc: Quick questions shown on the empty chat screen. One per line, max 10.
settings.site_base_url_desc: The domain used in verification email links, e.g. https://kb.example.com. Set this before enabling email verification.
settings.email_verification_desc: When enabled, new users must click the verification link in their email before they can log in. Make sure SMTP and Site Base URL are configured first.
settings.email_verification_off: Disabled (users can log in immediately after registration)
settings.chat_engine_desc: Select the engine backend for chat Q&A, conversation titles, and What's New summaries (document classification always uses Claude CLI)
settings.openai_api_key_set: Already set (leave blank to keep unchanged)
settings.task_headers_desc: Only applies to the OpenAI-compatible engine. Use for routing and labeling in gateways like Portkey.

admin.user_reset_password_prompt: Set a new password for this user (≥8 characters)
admin.user_delete_confirm: Permanently delete user "{email}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.group_select_hint: Select a group to configure membership rules and permissions.
admin.group_rules_desc: A user joins if any rule matches. Click "Recompute memberships" after changing rules.
admin.group_rule_value_placeholder: Separate multiple values with space, comma, or newline
admin.ws_group_grant_desc: Group members automatically gain workspace access (combined with individual members).
admin.ws_sq_desc: Leave blank to use global questions. One per line, max 10.
admin.ws_delete_modal_desc: This will permanently delete workspace "{name}" and all its documents and conversations. This cannot be undone.
admin.ws_delete_input_hint: Type the workspace name to confirm:
admin.ws_delete_download_msg: Download has started. Confirm the download is complete before deleting.
admin.ws_delete_download_confirm: Download complete? Click "Confirm delete" to permanently delete this workspace.
admin.cat_desc: Admin-defined categories. The agent assigns the best-matching category to each document.
admin.prompts_no_history: No history yet (saves create a record)
admin.prompts_rollback_confirm: Roll back to v{version}? The current content will be saved as a new version.
admin.prompts_label_answer_fetch_prompt: Q&A Prompt (Phase 1: Decide if source text is needed)
admin.prompts_desc_answer_fetch_prompt: The agent uses the summary index to judge whether it can answer. If summaries suffice, it answers directly; otherwise it declares which documents it needs (fetch mode). Must include '{question}', '{catalog}', '{history}'.
admin.prompts_label_answer_prompt: Q&A Prompt (Phase 2: Answer using source text)
admin.prompts_desc_answer_prompt: Used when Phase 1 decides summaries are insufficient. The agent fetches the document text and uses this prompt to answer. Must include '{question}', '{catalog}', '{history}', '{fulltext}', '{timestamp}'.
admin.prompts_desc_classify_prompt: Used by the agent to classify documents, generate summaries and tags after reading the source text. Must include the '{categories}' placeholder (list of category names).
admin.prompts_desc_title_prompt: Used to auto-generate a conversation title after the user sends the first message. Must include the '{message}' placeholder (replaced at runtime with the first user message).
admin.prompts_desc_whatsnew_prompt: Used by the scheduled task to generate the What's New summary for each workspace. Must include '{workspace_name}', '{period}', '{doc_count}', '{documents}', '{timestamp}'.

verifyEmail.success_desc: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.
verifyEmail.expired: The verification link has expired (valid for 24 hours). Please register again or contact your administrator.
verifyEmail.invalid: Invalid verification link. Please check that you copied the full URL.
